kirundi.correct_the_exact_answer_and_estimate_: Ni vyo. Inyishu nyakuri n'igereranya birahuye.
kirundi.your_exact_answer_is_correct_revise_th: Inyishu cyawe nyakuri ni cyo. Hindura igereranya kugira ngo kibe hafi vyihagije ngo gikoreshwe mu kugenzura.
kirundi.not_yet_compare_your_answer_with_your_: Ntivyarakunda. Gereranya inyishu cyawe n'igereranya cyawe hanyuma ugerageze ubundi buryo.

kirundi.correct_the_operation_and_context_answ: Ni vyo. Operation n'inyishu gishingiye ku mumaro vyompi bihuye n'inkuru.
kirundi.reconsider_which_operation_represents_: Ongera utekereze operation igaragaza isano riri mu nkuru.

kirundi.place_value_table_and_text_alternative: Imbonerahamwe ya place value n'ubundi buryo bwanditse
kirundi.has_no_dots_because_one_factor_is_zero: nta duce dufite kuko factor imwe ari zeru; product ni zeru.
kirundi.one_factor_is_0_so_there_are_no_equal_: Factor imwe ni 0, gutyo nta matsinda angana yo gushushanya. Product: 0.
kirundi.area_model_showing_partial_products_fo: Model ya area yerekana partial products kuri
kirundi.this_whole_number_workspace_keeps_the_: Ubu buriri bw'akazi bwa whole number butuma umubare wa kabiri utarenga uwa mbere. Iyo intego yo kwiga ari inyishu bibi, koresha integer number line.
kirundi.reasonableness_check_use_friendly_oper: Kugenzura ko bishoboka: koresha imibare yoroshye kubara
kirundi.estimation_is_a_safety_check_not_a_rep: Kugereranya ni ukugenzura kw'umutekano, si ugusimbura gutekereza neza.
kirundi.correct_your_exact_answer_and_estimate: Ni vyo. Inyishu cyawe nyakuri n'igereranya cyawe birashyigikirana.
kirundi.your_exact_answer_is_right_revise_the_: Inyishu cyawe nyakuri ni cyo. Hindura igereranya kugira ngo kigwe mu rwego rushoboka hafi ya
kirundi.not_yet_recheck_each_place_and_compare: Ntivyarakunda. Ongera ugenzure buri place value hanyuma uyigereranye n'igereranya cyawe.
kirundi.diagnose_the_reasoning_not_the_learner: Sesengura ubwenge, atari umunyeshure. Amakosa ni ivymenyetso by'uwo model uzafasha ubutaha.
kirundi.look_again_at_what_happened_to_each_pl: Ongera urebe ivyabaye kuri buri place value canke buri partial product.
kirundi.that_operation_does_not_represent_the_: Iyo operation ntiragaragaza isano. Ibaze niba inkuru iri guhuza, gutandukanya, gusubiramo amatsinda angana, canke ishaka amatsinda angahe yakwinjiramo.
kirundi.the_whole_number_answer_is_right_re_re: Inyishu cya whole number ni cyo. Ongera usome ico inkuru isaba gukora ku bisigaye.
kirundi.the_operation_fits_recheck_the_calcula: Operation irakwiye. Ongera ugenzure ibarura hanyuma wemeze niba umumaro ukoresha quotient, ivysigaye, canke itsinda ryiyongereye.
kirundi.choose_the_operation_from_the_story_th: Hitamwo operation mu nkuru, hanyuma usigure inyishu ushingiye ku mumaro.
kirundi.n_3_relationship_are_quantities_joined_s: 3. Isano: ingano ziri guhuzwa, gutandukanywa, gusubiramo mu matsinda angana, canke gushyirwa mu matsinda hakurikijwe ubunini?
kirundi.n_5_context_check_decide_what_the_story_: 5. Kugenzura umumaro: emeza ico bisigura ku nkuru iyo hasigaye ingano runaka.
kirundi.build_meaning_first_compare_strategies: Banza wubake insiguro, ugereranye uburyo, kandi ukoreshe igereranya mu kugenzura buri gisubizo.
kirundi.a_correct_answer_matters_but_a_model_e: Inyishu c'ukuri ni ingenzi, ariko model, ivysobanuro, igereranya, no kugenzura ukoresheje inverse operation ni vyo bitura ubwenge burambye.
